'''Sabercats''' were dangerous [[feline]]s found on the [[planet]] [[Lothal]]<ref name="Ultimate Star Wars" /> that preyed on [[Loth-cat]] kittens.<ref name="Epic Battles">''[[Star Wars Rebels: Visual Guide: Epic Battles]]''</ref> They used the [[grass]] of Lothal's grasslands as cover while hunting herbivores.<ref name="VE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The sabercat was a horned feline species that first appeared in the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] comic [[Star Wars (1977) 36|''Star Wars'' (1977) 36]]. The creature itself was first mentioned in canon in ''[[Ultimate Star Wars]]''.
